zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Neville of Liversedge於1486年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾利福瑟其時，他的父親Robert Neville I36歲，母親Joanna Woodford32歲。他於大約1511年與Alice Bosville在英國英格蘭越可爾設維特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1540年被列為high sheriff of yorkshire。他去世於1542年在他的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國越可爾比爾斯塔爾。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Neville of Liversedge was born in 1486, in Liversedge, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Neville I, was 36 and his mother, Joanna Woodford, was 32. He married Alice Bosville about 1511, in Chevet, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. In 1540, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of yorkshire. He died in 1542, in his hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in Birstall, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Neville of Liversedge est né en 1486, à Liversedge, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Neville I, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Joanna Woodford, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Alice Bosville environ 1511, à Chevet, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. En 1540, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of yorkshire. Il est décédé en 1542, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Birstall, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Neville of Liversedge 1486 in Liversedge, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Neville I 36 und seine Mutter Joanna Woodford 32. Er hat um 1511 in Chevet, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Bosville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1540 ist sein Beruf als high sheriff of yorkshire aufgeführt. Er starb 1542 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Birstall, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Neville of Liversedge è nato il nel 1486 nel Liversedge, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Neville I, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Joanna Woodford, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Alice Bosville circa 1511, nel Chevet, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1540, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of yorkshire. Morì nel 1542, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Birstall, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Neville of Liversedgeが1486年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリバーセッジで生まれた時，父Robert Neville Iは36歳，母Joanna Woodfordは32歳であった。約1511年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアチェベトでAlice Bosvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1540年，職業はhigh sheriff of yorkshireと記録されている。彼は1542年に故郷で56歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアバースタルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Neville of Liversedge(이)가 1486년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 라이버세지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Neville I(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna Woodford(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1511년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 처베트에서 Alice Bosville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1540년, 그의 직업은 high sheriff of yorkshire이었다. 그는 1542년 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 비르스탤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Neville of Liversedge nasceu em 1486, em Liversedge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Neville I, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Woodford, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Bosville aproximadamente 1511, em Chevet, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1540, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of yorkshire. Ele faleceu em 1542, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Birstall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Neville of Liversedge родился в 1486 г. в местности ливирседж, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Neville I было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Woodford, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Bosville около 1511 г. в местности чевет, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1540 году он работал по профессии high sheriff of yorkshire. Он умер в 1542 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности бирсталл, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Neville of Liversedge nació en 1486, en Liversedge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Neville I, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Joanna Woodford, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Alice Bosville aproximadamente 1511, en Chevet, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1540, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of yorkshire. Murió en 1542, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Birstall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
